output.code:
text = """ صلى الله عليه وسلم تعني الدعاء للنبي محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم بالرحمة والسلام. قال الله تعالى في القرآن الكريم: "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا" (سورة الأحزاب: 56).
كما ورد في الحديث الشريف عن عبد الله بن عمرو بن العاص رضي الله عنهما أنه سمع النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول: "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا" (رواه مسلم).
فالصلاة على النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم هي من العبادات المستحبة التي تقرب المسلم إلى الله تعالى وتزيد من حسناته. """
len(text), text

aya = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا"
hadith = "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا"
start_aya = text.find(aya)
end_aya = start_aya + len(aya)
start_hadith = text.find(hadith)
end_hadith = start_hadith + len(hadith)
(start_aya, end_aya, text[start_aya-1], text[end_aya], start_hadith, end_hadith, text[start_hadith-1], text[end_hadith])

action.query: "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا"

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":113,"span_end":241,"span_text":"إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الأحزاب","sura_number":33,"aya_number":56},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":372,"span_end":411,"span_text":"من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim","book_number":4,"hadith_number":408},"corrected_text":"من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه عشرا","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
